title: French Keto Quiche
description: A rich and creamy quiche made with a buttery crust and a filling of eggs, cream, and cheese, perfect for a keto diet.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the flour, Parmesan cheese, and salt. Add the cold butter and use a pastry blender or your fingers to work it into the flour until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
Press the mixture into the bottom and up the sides of a 9-inch (23cm) tart pan with a removable bottom.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs, heavy cream, shredded cheese, salt, and black pepper.
Pour the egg mixture into the prepared tart crust.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the edges are golden brown and the center is set.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before slicing and serving.
